content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Tue, 17 Feb 2026 05:01:40 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 237 | Critical: 74 | High: 28 | Medium: 19 | Low: 116

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST]   Ill Be Involved Indirectly : Trump On High - Stakes US - Iran Nuclear Talks In Geneva | World News (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of more US talks (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST]   Theyre bad negotiator : Donald Trump sends Iran a B2  reminder ; nuclear talks set to continue (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] US vs Iran : Will Trump attack Iran if talks fail in Geneva ? – Firstpost (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Trump says he will be involved  indirectly  in Iran nuclear talks (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (50 events, 25 critical, 6 high):
    -   Ill Be Involved Indirectly : Trump On High - Stakes US - Iran Nuclear Talks In Geneva | World News

  United States (5 events, 1 critical, 2 high):

    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (73 events, 13 critical, 9 high):
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols
    - Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
    - Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time
